log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kenku — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Kenku — Iron Concentration --- HP: 27/67 | AC: 14

** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
